product.title: Leg Makeup Waterproof No Transfer,Leg and Body Scar Cover up,Tattoo Cover Up Makeup Waterproof,Long Last Body Foundation (2# Medium Golw, 4 FL OZ)
featureBullets: Our waterproof body makeup has three color options to choose from, it can be used for leg makeup

The leg makeup waterproof no transfer body foundation is formulated with ingredients that are suitable for sensitive skin types,so it will feel comfortable on your skin and can be use by people of all ages
This tattoo cover up makeup waterproof for legs gives a no Transfer, waterproof and sweatproof finish on your face and body
First, squeeze out the lotion and apply it evenly on the skin of the legs, and wait for 5-10 minutes. Then, after drying. gently pat to allow the emulsion to better blend into the skin
This body foundation suitable for all skin types, our body makeup cream is gentle and soft, perfect for any occasion

specification.value: #35,008 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #6 in Body Concealer

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers have mixed opinions about the makeup's coverage, with some finding it excellent while others say it doesn't cover well at all. Moreover, the product rubs off all over everything for days, and customers find it hard to match to their skin color. Additionally, the quality receives negative feedback, with customers describing it as awful.

reviews.reviewText: I have used Sally Hansen before and thought this looked like a close contender, it was cheaper in was the color I wanted, Fairest Glow, so I got it. The color is perfect and smoothes out splotchy skin. The thing with this and Sally Hansen is that you can't cake it on and you have to let it dry a good 10-15 minutes (at least on the Eastern Seaboard, where it's pretty humid in the summer). THEN, I spray my legs and arms with a makeup setting spray. Just a light mist & let that completely dry. Then, it doesn't rub off on clothes - although, I wouldn't sit on furniture with my bare legs: if you sweat, it will come off because your legs are all pressed against the material with no place for the sweat to evaporate to. Think about it.... Over all, product is great and I'm happy with my results! Definitely will buy this again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 16, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Did not cover small veins or scars. Don’t like the feel and yellowish tinge for the Fair color.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It has a real nice color but rubs off on everything even letting it dry and patting it it got all over everything and if you don’t get it off material / clothing it’s hard to come off
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 18, 2024

reviews.reviewText: I am one to try all kinds of products to cover flaws on my legs. The coverage on this is good, however leaves a sticky feeling shortly after you put it on. I've tried putting talk powder over it that doesn't work though. And it lasts until you wash it off.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 23, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I originally got the medium-not tan enough yet for it so I got the fair and holy smokes does this work. It covers up all my imperfections from having kids (varicose veins) nicely! I also used a brush to apply it. The only thing is if you have tattoos, it looks a little weird over them but honestly I don’t care and that’s not enough for me to return it, so I’m keeping it! Oh, make sure you use a very small amount around your ankles/feet-it goes a long way!!! The portion of my leg I did, I olny used 3 pea sized drops and it covered up the whole front of my leg. So it’ll last and you’ll get plenty of use out it!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 19, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Looks amazing but stains white clothes.
reviews.reviewText: I used this during my whole cruise. It's the o ly time I wear shorts or dresses because of my eczema scars on my legs. My legs have never looked this good and in the end I still achieved a natural tan towards the end! I didn't give it a 5 star because it did stain my clothes even after I wiped the excess off and let it completely dry. But I will still use this product just not with white clothes.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 28, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Unnatural color, rubs off on clothes.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This product is not good. It smears, does not cover well and rubs off on your clothes and other items your legs may touch. I have purchased other brands that are much better.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 10, 2024
